chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-130 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. 18-01-2024 Syed Zaffar Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** We have seen the contents of petition and are of the view that it is not maintainable. There is a dispute apparently between the petitioner and private respondents over possession of some property, for which the petitioner has an adequate remedy before the Civil Court. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail the remedy in accordance with law, if he is advised so. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
